nodes.name: Manual Trigger
nodes.notes: Run manually to test. Switch to Schedule Trigger for automation.

nodes.name: List Product Folders
nodes.notes: Lists all 16 product folders inside 'Products Marketing Content Output'. Each folder becomes one item with id and name.

nodes.name: List 15 Documents
nodes.notes: Lists all 15 Google Docs inside each product folder. Passes folder id and product name forward.

nodes.name: Group Files by Product
nodes.notes: Groups the 240 individual file items back into 16 product items. Each product item has fileIds map: slot → Google Doc ID.

nodes.name: Upload DOCX to Product Folder
nodes.notes: Uploads the .docx directly into the same product folder on Google Drive. Uses the folder ID from Node 1.
